sourcesContent:
import React, { useContext } from "react"; import Particle from "../../Particle"; import { Container, Row, Col } from "react-bootstrap"; import Zoom from "react-reveal/Zoom"; import { Fade } from "react-reveal"; import LanguageContext from "../../LanguageContext"; import fog from "../../images/fog.png"; import linux from "../../images/linux.png"; import proxmox from "../../images/proxmox.png"; import rag from "../../images/rag.png"; import rdf from "../../images/rdf.png"; import { FaCode } from "react-icons/fa"; export default function ProjectPage() { const { t } = useContext(LanguageContext); return (

{t.projects.title}

{/* FOG */}
Déploiement automatisé (FOG Project)

Déploiement automatique d’OS et gestion d’images machines via PXE/FOG.

Linux, PXE, FOG Project
{/* LINUX SERVICES */}
Services infrastructure Linux

Déploiement et administration de services : Asterisk, OpenVPN, GLPI, Zabbix.

Linux, Asterisk, OpenVPN, GLPI, Zabbix
{/* PROXMOX */}
Backup & migration Proxmox

Sauvegarde, restauration et migration de machines virtuelles.

Proxmox, Virtualisation
{/* RAG */}
Système RAG (IA)

Système de génération augmentée par récupération (Python + NLP).

Python, IA, NLP
{/* RDF / SKOS */}
Graphes RDF / SKOS

Indexation et interrogation de graphes sémantiques RDF/SKOS.

Python, RDF, SKOS
); }
